mission.title: karmada: [umbrella] Add Implementation for PropagationPolicy priority and preemption
mission.description: [umbrella] Add Implementation for PropagationPolicy priority and preemption. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current karmada deployment
steps.description:
Verify your karmada version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
helm list -n karmada 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working karmada installation.

steps.title: Review karmada configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant karmada configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
kubectl get configmap -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=karmada
```
**What would you like to be added**:
In #3684, we propose a mechanism for PropagationPolicy priority and preemption.

The specific work items are as follows:

**Why is this needed**:

Ref proposal #3684

steps.title: Apply the fix for [umbrella] Add Implementation for PropagationPolicy…
steps.description:
> Thanks . Before you start the task, I'd like to ensure that you have enough time and be able to merge it before 7.25. If you are ok, I'd like to help you complete it. :)

sure, glad to see you are willing to help me with this task. I have put it at the top of my work queue, I will submit a PR as soon as possible.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
kubectl get events -n karmada --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[umbrella] Add Implementation for PropagationPolicy…" is functioning correctly.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with karmada installed or the issue environment reproducible.
